he think about what he wanted to do for the whole PhD it starts (the AI ideation thing). His criterion was: (1) something he cares about and he will be happy if it becomes true even not from his hand; (2) it is impactful enough with many ppl care about and it is something within his reach; (3) can not be solved in the near future
I was so surprised

turns.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao
turns.text: I am not a successful one but I have studied the placement and trajectory of many PhD students before I start. My major takeaway is that: you should never expect enough resource from the department. You should bring your resource to your PhD, not work under the assumption of limited resource, like the hunter of the tribe

turns.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao
turns.text: I am optimistic about the field (NLP?) just not optimistic about academia
